Package org.eventb.internal.core.pm

Class ProofModifier

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.pm.ProofModifier
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofRebuilder, ProofSimplifier
abstract class ProofModifier extends Object
Abstract class for proof modification operations.
Since:
1.3

  • Constructor Details

    • ProofModifier

  • Method Details

    • perform

      public boolean perform(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Attempts to perform the modification of the proof.

      If the modification is successful, then the proof attempt is committed (with the simplify option turned on).

      Parameters:
      monitor - the progress monitor to use for reporting progress to the user. It is the caller's responsibility to call done() on the given monitor. Accepts null, indicating that no progress should be reported and that the operation cannot be cancelled.
      Returns:
      true iff the proof was successfully modified
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • makeNewProof

      protected abstract boolean makeNewProof(IProofAttempt pa, IProofSkeleton originalSkeleton, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Makes a new proof in the given proof attempt from the given original proof skeleton.
      Parameters:
      pa - a fresh new proof attempt
      originalSkeleton - the skeleton of the original proof
      monitor - the progress monitor to use for reporting progress to the user.
      Returns:
      true iff the new proof was successfully made; if false is returned, the proof attempt will not be committed

    • isValidProof

      private boolean isValidProof()
